newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. LITEON's COMPUTEX 2026 reveals (800VDC liquid-cooled power rack, 110kW power shelf, 280kW in-rack CDU) and the POET co-packaged-optics co-development were June 2-5, already reflected in the prior case; price is essentially flat since.

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha vs passives lens: nothing new since June 9; COMPUTEX 110kW shelf already priced and stock flat. Page already tags it crowded/rerated; +34% YTD keeps compressing residual under-owned upside without fresh fundamentals. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Real AI server-power and 800VDC/110kW shelf positioning at GTC/COMPUTEX with a near-term ramp.
verdicts.neutral: Crowded/rerated benchmark; diversified electronics dilutes pure AI-power alpha.
verdicts.bear: Electronics-margin/cycle drag; the rerating leaves little residual alpha vs passives.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: POET optical-interposer co-development and COMPUTEX optical/power modules already in the prior case (Jun 2-5); no net-new since June 9 and price flat. Diversified electronics profile still dilutes pure CPO alpha. Hold; +34% YTD captures upside.
verdicts.bull: POET co-packaged-optics collaboration gives genuine optical-module optionality alongside power.
verdicts.neutral: CPO adjacency is real but secondary to a broad electronics mix; no fresh catalyst.
verdicts.bear: Not a pure semiconductor/CPO play; electronics cycle and margins dominate.
